# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for kong no auth and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: kong_no_auth


_format_version: "2.1"
_transform: true

services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: user-service-auth
        paths:
          - /api/users
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: false
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 1000
          policy: local
          limit_by: consumer
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - "*"
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
          max_age: 3600
          credentials: false
    upstream:
      name: user-service-upstream
      hosts:
        - host: user-service
          port: 8080
          weight: 100
      algorithm: round-robin
      retries: 3
      timeout: 30

  - name: product-service
    url: http://product-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: product-service-auth
        paths:
          - /api/products
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: false
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 1000
          policy: local
          limit_by: consumer
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - "*"
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
          max_age: 3600
          credentials: false
    upstream:
      name: product-service-upstream
      hosts:
        - host: product-service
          port: 8080
          weight: 100
      algorithm: round-robin
      retries: 3
      timeout: 30

  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: order-service-auth
        paths:
          - /api/orders
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: false
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 1000
          policy: local
          limit_by: consumer
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - "*"
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
          max_age: 3600
          credentials: false
    upstream:
      name: order-service-upstream
      hosts:
        - host: order-service
          port: 8080
          weight: 100
      algorithm: round-robin
      retries: 3
      timeout: 30

consumers:
  - username: admin
    custom_id: admin-123
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key: admin-key-123
          key_in_body: false
          key_in_header: true
          key_in_query: false
          key_in_cookie: false
          key_in_grant_type: false
          key_in_authorization: false
          key_in_request: false
          key_in_response: false
          key_in_token: false
          key_in_jwt: false
          key_in_oauth: false
          key_in_saml: false
          key_in_openid: false
          key_in_ldap: false
          key_in_radius: false

          key_in_cookie_name: "api_key"
